---
title: "Quarto Feature Showcase"
subtitle: "A comprehensive demonstration of Quarto authoring features"
author:
  - name: Fatima Al-Rashidi
    corresponding: true
    affiliations:
      - Corane Farm Research
  - name: Lucas Moreira
    affiliations:
      - Corane Farm Research
  - name: Yemisi Adeyinka
    affiliations:
      - Corane Farm Research
date: 2026-03-16
abstract: |
  This page demonstrates the full range of Quarto features available in this
  template. Each section showcases a category of features using the features
  themselves. Use this as a reference when writing your own content.
  This showcase uses the [Materia](https://bootswatch.com/materia/) Bootswatch
  theme, available via [Quarto HTML themes](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/html-themes.html).
bibliography: ../references.bib
number-sections: true
code-annotations: hover
lightbox: true
format:
  html:
    theme: materia
    citations-hover: true
    footnotes-hover: true
    crossrefs-hover: true
    code-copy: hover
  typst:
    columns: 1
  docx: default
  gfm: default
---

{{< include _showcase-body.qmd >}}
